name: Google Pay Flex Axis Bank Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Google Pay Flex Axis Bank Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Unlock 2X stars in the current reward cycle by spending Rs 100 or more in the previous cycle
Unlock promotional 4X stars after spending more than Rs 15,000 in the current reward period, subject to Google Pay campaign terms
Unlock promotional 8X stars after spending more than Rs 30,000 in the current reward period, subject to Google Pay campaign terms
additionalBenefits: Lifetime free card with waived joining fee and annual fee
Earn 1 star for every cumulative Rs 500 spent on eligible spends, including fuel
1 star equals Re 1 and can be redeemed instantly while making UPI payments using this card on Google Pay
Welcome reward includes Rs 250 gift card and 250 stars on Google Pay, subject to Google Pay offers
Earn 2 stars per Rs 500 in the first reward period
Flexible repayment from Google Pay app, including full payment or EMI subject to bill amount and eligibility
Up to 15% off on dining via EazyDiner, capped at Rs 500 per month
Convert transactions of Rs 2,500 or more into EMI

salaried: Apply through the Money tab on Google Pay under Flex by Google Pay, subject to Axis Bank eligibility
selfEmployed: Apply through the Money tab on Google Pay under Flex by Google Pay, subject to Axis Bank eligibility
